summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (title update) and REQ-2 (avatar redesign) across the required files. All major acceptance criteria appear satisfied: the HTML title is updated, all dialogs use the new title, AppLayout.tsx shows the new header wordmark and avatar, and AboutDialog.tsx displays the new avatar image. The new avatar image path references /assets/generated/vth-avatar.dim_256x256.png consistently. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were detected.
